scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,store,admin "npm run dev -w @ecom/api" "npm run dev -w @ecom/storefront" "npm run dev -w @ecom/admin-dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ecom/utils && npm run build -w @ecom/api-client && npm run build -w @ecom/ui && npm run build -w @ecom/api && npm run build -w @ecom/storefront && npm run build -w @ecom/admin-dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ecom/api && npm run test -w @ecom/utils
